C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\midshake_cpp.dir/objects.a
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\midshake_cpp.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\midshake_cpp.dir\objects1.rsp
C:\msys64\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -shared -o midshake_cpp.cp314-mingw_x86_64_msvcrt_gnu.pyd -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\midshake_cpp.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive @CMakeFiles\midshake_cpp.dir\linkLibs.rsp
